skills.name: Fente
skills.description: A lightning-quick attack that takes enemies by surprise and pierces him deeply. It has a longer range than other stabbing attacks.

skills.name: Sept Etoiles
skills.description: Rapidly pierces enemies and forces him to retreat.

effects: Double Damage to enemies with [Soft Armor]
Double Damage to enemies with [Soft Armor]

skills.name: Balestra Fente
skills.description: An advanced form of the Fente, accompanied by a surprising leap and powerful lunge.
skills.target: Up to 3 enemies 5.5m away and within 3m width

skills.name: Cent-Ennui
skills.description: Attacks enemies with a series of violent piercing movements.

skills.name: Tete
skills.description: Strikes enemies with the sword hilt before delivering a damaging slash.

skills.name: Evasion
skills.description: Increases Evasion for a while. Canceled, if Stance changes.

skills.name: Attaque Compose
skills.description: A rapid series of merciless slashes.

effects: Additional 50% damage to enemies with [Light Armor]
Additional 50% damage to enemies with [Light Armor]

skills.name: Esquive Touch
skills.description: A series of rapid slashes followed by a powerful stab to finish enemies off.

skills.name: Arme Bullet
skills.description: Shoots 5 times consecutively with the pistol in the left hand. This can be used as a normal attack.

skills.name: Croix Fente
skills.description: Slashes enemy and finishes him off with a powerful stab.

skills.name: Entrer en Lices
skills.description: Shoots enemies 5 times before stabbing him to his end. Can also be used on airborne enemies.

skills.name: Mortal Eternity
skills.description: Slashes enemies mercilessly for 8 hits before finishing with a fatal bullet.

skills.name: Plumbullet shot
skills.description: Fires a poisonous bullet.

skills.name: Double Firing
skills.description: Fire two rapid shots consecutively.

skills.name: Snap Shot
skills.description: Shoots 5 targets within a certain area.

skills.name: Zero-In
skills.description: Fires rapidly at a single enemy.

skills.description: Increases your shooting speed but sacrifices accuracy. A change of stance will cause you to lose this effect.

skills.target: Up to 5 enemies 9m away and within a 3m radius

skills.description: Shot to ankle of enemy.

skills.name: Surpassing Shot
